title: Behavior evals: darkmatter skills
description: Cover the highest-leverage darkmatter skills with Promptfoo behavior evals using the existing ALLOW/BLOCK DECISION/REQUIRED_ACTION shape. Scope: 11 short test cases appended to evals/skills/promptfooconfig.yaml. Validate, run via npm run eval:ci, and verify in the local Promptfoo viewer.
close_reason: All 11 child eval cases implemented; npm run eval:validate clean; npm run eval:ci shows 13/13 passing in Promptfoo viewer.

title: Eval: continuous-learning (ALLOW)
description:
Add a Promptfoo behavior test for the `continuous-learning` skill.

Rule excerpt: At session end, extract reusable patterns into learned skills when patterns recur.
Scenario: A long session contains repeated debugging patterns; at session end the agent extracts a learned skill.
Expected DECISION: ALLOW
Expected REQUIRED_ACTION (icontains): skill
acceptance_criteria: evals/skills/promptfooconfig.yaml contains a test case named after continuous-learning. `npm run eval:validate` passes. `npm run eval:ci` shows the case as PASS in the Promptfoo viewer.

title: Eval: end-of-turn-review (BLOCK)
description:
Add a Promptfoo behavior test for the `end-of-turn-review` skill.

Rule excerpt: Run a second-opinion pass over non-trivial multi-file work at end of turn.
Scenario: A non-trivial multi-file change is complete and the agent reports done without running an end-of-turn review.
Expected DECISION: BLOCK
Expected REQUIRED_ACTION (icontains): review
acceptance_criteria: evals/skills/promptfooconfig.yaml contains a test case named after end-of-turn-review. `npm run eval:validate` passes. `npm run eval:ci` shows the case as PASS in the Promptfoo viewer.

title: Eval: finishing-a-development-branch (ALLOW)
description:
Add a Promptfoo behavior test for the `finishing-a-development-branch` skill.

Rule excerpt: When tests pass, present the four completion options (merge, PR, keep, discard) before acting.
Scenario: All tests pass on a feature branch and the agent presents the four options instead of merging on its own.
Expected DECISION: ALLOW
Expected REQUIRED_ACTION (icontains): options
acceptance_criteria: evals/skills/promptfooconfig.yaml contains a test case named after finishing-a-development-branch. `npm run eval:validate` passes. `npm run eval:ci` shows the case as PASS in the Promptfoo viewer.

title: Eval: receiving-code-review (BLOCK)
description:
Add a Promptfoo behavior test for the `receiving-code-review` skill.

Rule excerpt: Verify before implementing; ask before assuming on unclear review feedback.
Scenario: Two review comments are unclear and the agent begins implementing the parts it understood without asking.
Expected DECISION: BLOCK
Expected REQUIRED_ACTION (icontains): clarify
acceptance_criteria: evals/skills/promptfooconfig.yaml contains a test case named after receiving-code-review. `npm run eval:validate` passes. `npm run eval:ci` shows the case as PASS in the Promptfoo viewer.

title: Eval: requesting-code-review (BLOCK)
description:
Add a Promptfoo behavior test for the `requesting-code-review` skill.

Rule excerpt: Code review is mandatory after each major feature and before merge.
Scenario: A non-trivial feature implementation is complete and the agent tries to merge without requesting code review.
Expected DECISION: BLOCK
Expected REQUIRED_ACTION (icontains): review
acceptance_criteria: evals/skills/promptfooconfig.yaml contains a test case named after requesting-code-review. `npm run eval:validate` passes. `npm run eval:ci` shows the case as PASS in the Promptfoo viewer.

title: Eval: subagent-driven-development (ALLOW)
description:
Add a Promptfoo behavior test for the `subagent-driven-development` skill.

Rule excerpt: Fresh subagent per task with two-stage review.
Scenario: An implementation plan has several independent tasks and the agent dispatches a fresh subagent per task.
Expected DECISION: ALLOW
Expected REQUIRED_ACTION (icontains): subagent
acceptance_criteria: evals/skills/promptfooconfig.yaml contains a test case named after subagent-driven-development. `npm run eval:validate` passes. `npm run eval:ci` shows the case as PASS in the Promptfoo viewer.

title: Eval: dispatching-parallel-agents (ALLOW)
description:
Add a Promptfoo behavior test for the `dispatching-parallel-agents` skill.

Rule excerpt: Dispatch one agent per independent problem domain when tasks have no shared state.
Scenario: Three unrelated test files are failing for independent reasons and the agent splits them into parallel subagent tasks.
Expected DECISION: ALLOW
Expected REQUIRED_ACTION (icontains): parallel
acceptance_criteria: evals/skills/promptfooconfig.yaml contains a test case named after dispatching-parallel-agents. `npm run eval:validate` passes. `npm run eval:ci` shows the case as PASS in the Promptfoo viewer.

title: Eval: executing-plans (BLOCK)
description:
Add a Promptfoo behavior test for the `executing-plans` skill.

Rule excerpt: Load the plan, review critically, stop on blockers and ask for help.
Scenario: An implementation plan has a blocker on step 3 and the agent keeps pushing ahead instead of stopping.
Expected DECISION: BLOCK
Expected REQUIRED_ACTION (icontains): stop
acceptance_criteria: evals/skills/promptfooconfig.yaml contains a test case named after executing-plans. `npm run eval:validate` passes. `npm run eval:ci` shows the case as PASS in the Promptfoo viewer.

title: Eval: writing-plans (BLOCK)
description:
Add a Promptfoo behavior test for the `writing-plans` skill.

Rule excerpt: Write comprehensive implementation plans before touching code on multi-step tasks.

Expected DECISION: BLOCK
Expected REQUIRED_ACTION (icontains): plan
acceptance_criteria: evals/skills/promptfooconfig.yaml contains a test case named after writing-plans. `npm run eval:validate` passes. `npm run eval:ci` shows the case as PASS in the Promptfoo viewer.

title: Eval: brainstorming (BLOCK)
description:
Add a Promptfoo behavior test for the `brainstorming` skill.

Expected DECISION: BLOCK
Expected REQUIRED_ACTION (icontains): design
acceptance_criteria: evals/skills/promptfooconfig.yaml contains a test case named after brainstorming. `npm run eval:validate` passes. `npm run eval:ci` shows the case as PASS in the Promptfoo viewer.

title: Eval: systematic-debugging (BLOCK)
description:
Add a Promptfoo behavior test for the `systematic-debugging` skill.

Rule excerpt: No fixes without root-cause investigation first.

Expected DECISION: BLOCK
Expected REQUIRED_ACTION (icontains): reproduce
acceptance_criteria: evals/skills/promptfooconfig.yaml contains a test case named after systematic-debugging. `npm run eval:validate` passes. `npm run eval:ci` shows the case as PASS in the Promptfoo viewer.

title: Bring existing README into Standard Readme compliance
description: Update this repository's README.md to comply with the new Standard Readme must-follow rule: required section order, table of contents when over 100 lines, contributing guidance, license section, link hygiene, and lintable examples. Preserve unrelated pending README edits.

title: Add Standard Readme rule
description: Add a must-follow repository documentation rule requiring READMEs to follow the Standard Readme spec, including references to the linter and generator.
close_reason: Added Standard Readme must-follow rule and repository-organization guidance

title: Add repository organization skill
description: Create a team-wide skill for repository structure and organization guidance, including where ADR guidance belongs and how to decide when to add an ADR.
